hero.label: Artify
hero.body: Artify delivers innovative, high-quality, and sustainable construction solutions for Mongolia's built environment.

projects.title: 150+ Projects
projects.description: Successfully delivered regional, urban, and industrial developments.

experts.title: 48+ Experts
experts.description: A strong team of engineering, design, and project management professionals.

about.label: 01 — About
about.heading: 12+ years of experience in construction
about.body1: Since our founding in 2014, we have maintained rigorous quality standards and delivered tailored solutions for every client.
about.body2: With expertise spanning engineering, design, and project management, we turn your construction vision into reality.

blockAcademy.title: Block Academy
blockAcademy.description: A training platform combining construction education, certification, and hands-on practice.

techInvent.title: Tech Invent
techInvent.description: Explore construction technology and innovation solutions through the Tech Invent project.

customMaterials.title: Custom Materials
customMaterials.description: Construction material solutions tailored to each project and adapted to local conditions.
